query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[0].id') as t0_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[0].rankFinal') as t0_rankFinal,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[0].rankCalculatedFinal') as t0_rankCalcFinal,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[1].id') as t1_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[1].rankCalculatedFinal') as t1_rankCalcFinal,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[2].id') as t2_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[2].rankCalculatedFinal') as t2_rankCalcFinal,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[3].id') as t3_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[3].rankCalculatedFinal') as t3_rankCalcFinal,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[4].id') as t4_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[4].rankCalculatedFinal') as t4_rankCalcFinal,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[5].id') as t5_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams[5].rankCalculatedFinal') as t5_rankCalcFinal
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2024 AND viewName = 'combined';
